_doc: M2 host DRAM backend, ANALYTIC (Ramulator2 deferred to Phase 2, ADR-0002). The MEASURED anchor is the production Metis Card's on-card LPDDR4x; the simulated forward-looking SoC uses LPDDR5 (a DIFFERENT memory). Do NOT report 24.2 as '% of LPDDR5'.
memory_type_measured: LPDDR4x (production Metis Card, on-card; exact config [GAP])
efficiency_evidence: HeteroInfer SOSP'25 Fig5: single-proc decode 40-45/68=59-66% of peak; web survey 60-80% (21% unoptimised, 85% best-case) for memory-bound LLM decode.
source_measured: voyager-sdk.md:278 (decode time prop weight bytes, r2=0.997)
